DFFlagJointsUseTimeDelta.mechanism: Changes how joint movements are calculated to be more frame rate independent.
DFFlagJointsUseTimeDelta.purpose: Ensures smoother animations regardless of the player's device performance.

FFlagLuaAppRfySignalApportioningIxp4_Sta.mechanism: Implements a new method for distributing signals in Lua applications.
FFlagLuaAppRfySignalApportioningIxp4_Sta.purpose: Enhances the responsiveness and efficiency of game scripts for better gameplay.

FFlagUseGetCanManageAsync.mechanism: Introduces an asynchronous method to check user permissions.
FFlagUseGetCanManageAsync.purpose: Improves the speed of permission checks, leading to faster game loading and interactions.

FFlagAddPeoplePageCardLayout4_IXP.mechanism: Revamps the layout of the people page to a new card design.
FFlagAddPeoplePageCardLayout4_IXP.purpose: Makes it easier for players to find and connect with friends.

FFlagNoEndianConversionClientBit.mechanism: Disables conversion of data formats between different byte orders on the client side.
FFlagNoEndianConversionClientBit.purpose: Improves performance by reducing unnecessary data processing.

DFFlagVideoUseVideoServiceContentImplBas.mechanism: Switches to a new system for handling video content using the Video Service.
DFFlagVideoUseVideoServiceContentImplBas.purpose: Enhances video playback quality and reliability for players.
